title: Verilator Internal error related to loop unrolling
body:
Hello,

We had these errors "Unsupported: Delayed assignment to array inside for loops (non-delayed is ok - see docs)". We fixed them through loop unrolling: --unroll-count 10000000 --unroll-stmts 10000000.

Now we are running into an internal error  "Unknown node type reached emitter: BEGIN"  at this particular code block

```
task xOne;
  integer i;
  begin
    for (i = 0; i < 8192; i = i + 1) begin
`ifdef delay
      u_ram.mem[i] <= #(`delay) {15{1'bx}};
`else
      u_ram.mem[i] <= #0.005 {15{1'bx}};
`endif
    end
    if (f_print) $display ("\tINFO %m ... ... %t", $realtime);
  end
endtask
```

We would appreciate your help on this.

Regards,
Kamel
